description: Stub manifest of known BNY-affiliated investment advisers. DATA-PLAN §9 risk #4 explicitly marks this as 'manual at first — IAPD search by entity name'. Detailed ADV pulls happen at Day 8 in 05_parse_adv.py; this file just records identifying info we already know plus IAPD lookup URLs. Populate `crd` from IAPD when each entry is verified.

advisers.notes: Largest US-registered BNY adviser; CRD/CIK to be confirmed via IAPD before Day 8.

advisers.legal_name: Newton Investment Management North America LLC

deferred_until_day_8: Per DATA-PLAN §8 step 05_parse_adv.py, the actual ADV Part 1 / Part 2 ingest happens on Day 8 from the SEC FOIA bulk extracts (or live IAPD per-firm). This stub exists so canonical IDs that already need to reference an entity can use stable DBA names; CRD/CIK are filled in at verification time.
